text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I did it! I achieved my goal and earned<n>my star!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's bring this star to<n>Goryokaku as an
offering!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Why? Because stars go together,<n>that's why!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Plus... I think it'll be fun to go<n>sightseeing around
the fort...<n>Together, I mean...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I have an idea for our next<n>race. I'd like to
run in the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It was only the compassion from my<n>devoted fans
that got me a spot in the<n>Takarazuka Kinen...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But this time, I want to actually earn<n>all those
votes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Let's take all these wishes we've<n>gathered and
bring them to Nakayama<n>at the end of the year.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Do you mean it? Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the final climactic battle<n>of the senior
year. With a star as<n>great as Goryokaku, we can't
lose!
